figma.note: Official remote Figma MCP server. Requires OAuth on first connection.

stitch.note: Official Stitch MCP server. Set STITCH_API_KEY locally or use the OAuth flow documented in config/VALLEY_FIRST_CONNECTION_CHECKLIST.md.

context7.note: Official Context7 remote MCP server. OAuth endpoint avoids versioning CONTEXT7_API_KEY; use https://mcp.context7.com/mcp plus a local CONTEXT7_API_KEY header only in private client config if needed.

linear.note: Official Linear MCP endpoint. Uses /mcp; the older /sse transport is deprecated.

playwright.note: Official Playwright MCP server for browser automation and visual validation.

cloudflare-api.note: Official Cloudflare API MCP server. Requires OAuth on first connection.
